description:
---
### [choco://dell-update](choco://dell-update)
To use choco:// protocol URLs, install [(unofficial) choco:// Protocol support ](https://chocolatey.org/packages/choco-protocol-support)

---

This package contains the Dell Update application for systems running the Windows 10 build 14393 (Redstone 1) or later. Dell Update application automatically updates critical fixes and important device drivers as they become available.

**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/blob/master/dell-update/readme.md)**
    

---

**Click here to [Patreon-ize](https://www.patreon.com/bcurran3) the package maintainer.**

---
summary: Dell Update supports Inspiron, Vostro, XPS and Alienware systems running Windows 10.
author: Dell Inc.
